base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_zombie_walk — a character from 1986 castlevania. Purple zombie — 2-frame shambling walk. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Purple zombie — 2-frame shambling walk; spawns repeatedly from graveyard off-screen; weakest enemy, dies in 1 whip-hit. Levels 1, 5
